code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut evens: List<Int> = []
mut odds: List<Int> = []

mut i = 0
mut cur = ""
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          if v % 2 == 0
            evens = list.push(evens, v)
          else
            odds = list.push(odds, v)
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(cur)
  match string.parse_int(cur)
  when Some(v)
    if v % 2 == 0
      evens = list.push(evens, v)
    else
      odds = list.push(odds, v)
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut evens_str = ""
mut j = 0
let elen = list.len(evens)
while j < elen
  match list.get(evens, j)
  when Some(v)
    if j == 0
      evens_str = "#{v}"
    else
      evens_str = "#{evens_str} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j + 1
end

mut odds_str = ""
mut k = 0
let olen = list.len(odds)
while k < olen
  match list.get(odds, k)
  when Some(v)
    if k == 0
      odds_str = "#{v}"
    else
      odds_str = "#{odds_str} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end

println("evens=#{evens_str}")
println("odds=#{odds_str}")
